ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "utm_x" REAL /* X coordinate in UTM */,
  "utm_y" REAL /* Y coordinate in UTM */,
  "measured_depth" REAL /* Depth of measurement */,
  "true_vertical_depth" REAL /* True vertical depth */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone of measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure measured at the depth */,
  "water_saturation" REAL /* Water saturation level */,
  "sgas" REAL /* Saturation gas level */,
  "soil" REAL /* Soil composition value */,
  "valid_zone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zone is valid */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is active */,
  "i" INTEGER /* Index value i */,
  "j" INTEGER /* Index value j */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Index value k */,
  "well" TEXT /* Well identifier */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the measurement depth */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the measurement depth */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil or water at the measurement depth */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Electrical conductivity of the soil or water at the measurement depth */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity level of the water at the measurement depth */,
  "geological_formation" TEXT /* Type of geological formation at the measurement depth */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement data is of high quality */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_well FOREIGN KEY ("well") REFERENCES wells ("well_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_zone FOREIGN KEY ("zone") REFERENCES zones ("zone_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geological characteristics of the zone */,
  "geological_characteristics" TEXT /* Detailed geological characteristics of the zone */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Potential environmental impact of activities in the zone */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zone is currently active for measurements */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the zone details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well */,
  "drilling_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the well drilling started */,
  "drilling_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the well drilling was completed */,
  "drilling_company" TEXT /* Name of the company that performed the drilling */,
  "well_status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., exploratory, production) */,
  "well_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the well */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, analyst, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for technician, 2 for analyst, 3 for manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
